backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the cricket game backend, implementing team management, match state tracking, tournament results, and user profile management with role-based access control (admin/user permissions).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (3D stadium, ball animation, fielder positions, etc.) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary of short summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose and recent changes of each component, page, hook, and utility.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for all game pages, wraps the app in QueryClientProvider, and guards authenticated routes by showing LoginScreen or ProfileSetupModal as needed.
frontend/src/components/CommentaryFeed.t: Scrollable commentary feed component that displays the most recent 20 ball events with color-coded badges and styling for wickets, sixes, and fours.
frontend/src/components/CricketStadium3D: A React Three Fiber 3D cricket stadium component that renders a ground, pitch, stumps, fielders, and animated ball events (sixes, fours, wickets) based on incoming ball event props.
frontend/src/components/DashboardCard.ts: A navigable card component for the dashboard that displays a title, description, icon, optional badge, and a 'Play Now' link using TanStack Router.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: A simple footer component showing the app name, copyright year, and a 'Built with caffeine.ai' attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: A sticky header with navigation links for cricket tournament sections, a user display name derived from their profile or Internet Identity principal, and a logout button.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: A login page featuring a stadium banner, app branding, and an Internet Identity login button with error handling and retry logic.
frontend/src/components/MatchResultSumma: Displays the final match result including winner, win margin, both team scorecards, top scorer, and best bowler, with Play Again and Go Back action buttons.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their player name and saves it via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation before they can start playing.
frontend/src/components/Scorecard.tsx: React component that displays a live cricket scorecard including runs/wickets, run rate, current batsmen stats, current bowler figures, and optional target/required runs info.
frontend/src/components/TeamSelector.tsx: React component rendering a grid of selectable team buttons with flag, name, and code, supporting exclusion of an already-selected opposing team.
frontend/src/components/TournamentPoints: React component that computes and displays a tournament standings table (points, wins, losses, NRR) from match results, highlighting top-N qualifying teams.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom hook and context provider for Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks wrapping backend actor calls for user profiles, teams, tournament teams/matches, and match CRUD operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file defining a dark cricket-themed design system with Tailwind, custom OKLCH color tokens, and utility classes for gold accents, stadium cards, and pitch gradients.
frontend/src/lib/authConfig.ts: Provides utility functions to determine the Internet Identity provider URL and whether the app is running in a local development environment.
frontend/src/lib/cricketData.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and static data for cricket teams and players, including international, IPL, BBL, and domestic league teams with batting/bowling ratings.
frontend/src/lib/matchSimulator.ts: Implements ball-by-ball cricket match simulation logic, including weighted random run/wicket generation, commentary generation, and full innings simulation.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/BBLTournament.tsx: BBL tournament page that simulates a round-robin group stage and finals for Big Bash League teams, recording results on-chain and displaying a points table.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying game mode cards (IPL, BBL, International, Domestic) with navigation links and a personalized greeting based on the user's profile.
frontend/src/pages/DomesticTournament.ts: Domestic tournament page supporting Ranji Trophy, Sheffield Shield, and County Championship leagues, simulating round-robin matches and recording results on-chain.
frontend/src/pages/InternationalMatch.ts: React page for simulating live international cricket matches across Test/ODI/T20 formats, supporting ball-by-ball or auto simulation with a 3D stadium view, scorecard, commentary feed, and match result summary.
frontend/src/pages/IPLTournament.tsx: React page that simulates an IPL tournament with a round-robin group stage and knockout rounds (Qualifier 1, Eliminator, Qualifier 2, Final) using T20 match simulation, recording results via backend hooks and displaying a points table.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persist them to sessionStorage, and clean sensitive parameters from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens, cricket-specific colors (pitch, gold), custom shadows, and animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 11) describing the cricket game app's features, architectural notes, and known issues including Internet Identity login problems on the deployed production site.
